chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3307 of 2022 Shahid Nabi Malik Versus Mst. Mussarat Intekhab Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 14708/22 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 13.02.2024 Mr. Basil Nabi Malik for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that subject matter of this petition is an order passed on an application under order VII Rule 11 CPC followed by the order of revisional Court. He further submits that the suit in fact has reached at the final conclusion. It is now coming up for final arguments and likely to be heard and decided soon. He only submits that if direction for an early disposal be given he would not press this petition. Since counsel is not pressing this petition, we dispose it of with the observation that the trial Court shall heard and decide the matter in hand at the earliest, preferably in four weeks. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
